---
title: "Lecture Title"
subtitle: "Erfassung und Monitoring von Wildtieren"
author: "Your Name"
date: "Semester YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: true
    transition: fade
    incremental: true
    toc: false
    center: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code anzeigen"
    footer: "Erfassung und Monitoring von Wildtieren"
---

## Learning objectives

After this lecture, you should be able to:

- understand the basic concepts
- apply key methods
- interpret monitoring data

---

## Outline

- Motivation
- Methods
- Examples
- Discussion

---

## Motivation

Why do we monitor wildlife populations?

---

## Methods

### Camera traps
- Passive monitoring
- Large spatial coverage

### Telemetry
- High temporal resolution
- Individual-based data

---

## Example: Camera trap data

```{r}
#| echo: true
hist(cars$speed, main = "Example histogram")
```
